_comment: ADR-019 relative session scoring + ADR-020 profile fit/opposition (schema v4). Band evaluation: priority descending, first band whose predicates ALL pass; exactly one fallback. minEfficiency/minBucketEfficiency are authored as fractions in [0,1] (loadData converts to integer percentage points: userTotal/ceilingTotal from computeSessionCeiling). W3 retune (sim n=500 seed=42 greedy+random): greedy total-eff compressed 96-100 (p50 99), so per-bucket efficiency (MID/ATT cascade 99->98->97->none) is the primary discriminator within the eff=98-99 majority. 10-0 requires near-perfect MID+ATT (99) AND WL>=86 — efficiency alone cannot let a star-XI-with-one-62 through. 7-1 shares WL>=86 with 10-0 but drops per-bucket (great total, strong floor, imperfect somewhere). 1-2 drops requireAllBucketsNonEmpty to catch structurally-broken-but-decent-eff drafts (empty GK, strong outfield). Six-gate protocol: greedy 10-0 6%, no band >40%, random top-3 0%, all bands >=1%, near-miss-10-0 11%, WL floor has teeth. ADR-020: `profiles` gives per-formation attr weights/targets for DEF/MID/ATT buckets (GK excluded — no attrs); `oppositions` is the rotating daily-opponent catalog (weightMods multiply profile weights before fit is computed). `minFit` is staged at 0 on the top three bands this wave (Wave A) — Wave D tunes the real numbers from sim data, per the Reveal-Luck Law (fit gates stay small, ~one rung, never match-deciding).

formations.description: Balanced classic — four defenders, three midfielders, three forwards
Traditional English — two strikers, flat four midfield
Attack-minded — three at the back, packed midfield
Defensive solidity — five defenders, counter-attacking outlets

4-3-3._comment: wing-pace / mid-accuracy — ATT bucket carries the wingers, so pace leads there; MID is the passing engine.

4-4-2._comment: balanced — no bucket leans hard on one axis.

3-5-2._comment: mid-accuracy-heavy — five in the middle, so MID accuracy dominates the shape.

5-3-2._comment: DEF-strength / ST-pace — five at the back need bulk, the two forwards live off the counter.

oppositions.label: THE PRESSING MACHINE
oppositions.tagline: Full-throttle press for ninety minutes — pace is at a premium today.

oppositions.label: THE LOW BLOCK
oppositions.tagline: Ten behind the ball, daring you to pick the lock — accuracy is at a premium today.

oppositions.label: AERIAL BOMBARDMENT
oppositions.tagline: Long balls and a giant at both boxes — strength is at a premium today.

oppositions.label: COUNTER KINGS
oppositions.tagline: Sit deep, break at speed, finish with a shoulder — pace and strength share the premium today.

oppositions.label: THE POSSESSION CULT
oppositions.tagline: A thousand passes before they even think about goal — accuracy is at a serious premium today.

oppositions.label: NEUTRAL
oppositions.tagline: No particular gameplan to read into — a fair fight today.
